violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of an ice cream chest freezer, Jeni's Ice Cream freezer, and freezer 88 have an accumulation of frost, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the produce refrigerator 4, plastic produce bins, and an employee refrigerator have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The water heater has an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
Ceiling tiles observed stained with previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

The cupboard beneath the sink in employee area 1 has an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
The outer covering of insulation on water pipes is in poor repair, exposing spun insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

The outside area near the loading dock has an accumulation of rocks and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice freezer have an accumulation of frost. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

The door to the outside, located in the receiving dock, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
